CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, xml_data XML);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE xpath_contains(xml_data, 'ValueX');
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE xpath_contains(xml_data, 'ValueY') AND xpath_contains(xml_data, 'ValueX');
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE xpath_contains(xml_data, 'ValueZ') OR xpath_contains(xml_data, 'ValueA');
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE xpath_contains(xml_data, 'ValueZ') AND id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE xpath_contains(xml_data, 'ValueY'));
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM test_table t2 WHERE xpath_contains(t2.xml_data, 'ValueX') AND t2.id = test_table.id);
SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE NOT xpath_contains(xml_data, 'ValueA') AND xpath_contains(xml_data, 'ValueX');
CREATE TABLE nested_table (id INT, parent_id INT, xml_data XML);
INSERT INTO nested_table (id, parent_id, xml_data) VALUES (1, NULL, '<parent><child>Value1</child></parent>');
INSERT INTO nested_table (id, parent_id, xml_data) VALUES (2, 1, '<child>Value2</child>');
SELECT nt.id FROM nested_table nt JOIN test_table tt ON nt.parent_id = tt.id WHERE xpath_contains(nt.xml_data, 'Value2') AND xpath_contains(tt.xml_data, 'ValueX');
